title: docs: update README — 2026-07-23
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News section. (Recent Apps is refreshed by Apps / Update metrics.)

gist.headline: Fresh news in the garden
gist.blurb: The README's Latest News section got its daily tending. The front door now points visitors toward the newest things growing in the hive.
gist.summary: Refreshed the root README's Latest News section for 2026-07-23, keeping the project landing page current while app metrics continue updating separately.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will find current project news in the README's Latest News section.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polli as the observant keeper of an open-source garden noticeboard, pinning a fresh pixel-news sheet onto a retro README terminal while small flowers and code-plants grow nearby. The scene represents the repository front page being regularly refreshed, with a subtle date card and no busy text.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, a cute pixel bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown stripes, black antennae, black oval eyes, bright pink rectangular cheek blush, a happy smile, and small rounded light-blue translucent wings, wearing tiny librarian glasses as she pins a fresh news page to a glowing retro terminal labeled "README". Lime green (#ecf874) noticeboard and code-plants bloom among pastel flowers, with warm cream and lavender gradients, cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic and emotionally warm.
